title: Onyx Power Secures Connection to Wilhelmshaven Coastal Hydrogen Pipeline
content: Onyx Power has secured an agreement with Open Grid Europe (OGE) to connect its Wilhelmshaven power plant to the Wilhelmshaven Coastal Hydrogen Pipeline, slated for completion in 2027. This move positions Onyx Power to contribute hydrogen to Germany's national transport network, supporting the transition from coal to renewable energy sources. The Wilhelmshaven Coastal Line and the North Sea-Ruhr Link are key components of Germany's approved hydrogen core network, facilitating the distribution of hydrogen from northern production sites to consumption centers across the country.
author: Analysts Account
